title: Replace deprecated assertEquals with assertEqual in tests
description: Updates test files to use assertEqual instead of the deprecated assertEquals alias, which will be removed in Python 3.14.
diff:
diff --git a/tests/test_validators.py b/tests/test_validators.py
index 8f9a0b1..c2d3e4f 100644
--- a/tests/test_validators.py
+++ b/tests/test_validators.py
@@ -12,11 +12,11 @@ class TestEmailValidator(unittest.TestCase):
 
     def test_valid_email(self):
         result = validate_email("user@example.com")
-        self.assertEquals(result, True)
+        self.assertEqual(result, True)
 
     def test_invalid_email(self):
         result = validate_email("not-an-email")
-        self.assertEquals(result, False)
+        self.assertEqual(result, False)
 
     def test_empty_email(self):
         result = validate_email("")
-        self.assertEquals(result, False)
+        self.assertEqual(result, False)
comments: tara: Good cleanup for Python 3.14 compat. Approve.
author: uri
